mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM crm_group g WHERE

SELECT g.id AS group_id, g.group_code, g.group_name, g.group_category, g.group_type_code, org.org_name AS bu_name, manager.user_name AS manager_name, CASE WHEN g.is_important = 1 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS important, CASE WHEN g.is_key_customer = 1 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS key_customer, CASE WHEN g.is_139 = 1 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS is139, g.location_type, g.contact_book_status, COALESCE(rev.last_month_revenue, 0) AS last_month_revenue FROM crm_group g LEFT JOIN sys_org org ON org.id = g.bu_org_id LEFT JOIN sys_user manager ON manager.id = g.manager_user_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT group_id, revenue_month, SUM(revenue_amount) AS last_month_revenue FROM biz_group_revenue_monthly WHERE revenue_month = ( SELECT MAX(revenue_month) FROM biz_group_revenue_monthly ) GROUP BY group_id, revenue_month ) rev ON rev.group_id = g.id WHERE ORDER BY g.updated_time DESC, g.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT id FROM crm_group WHERE manager_user_id = #{managerUserId} AND status = '有效' AND deleted_flag = 0
SELECT id FROM crm_group WHERE bu_org_id = #{orgId} AND status = '有效' AND deleted_flag = 0

SELECT g.id AS group_id, g.group_code, g.group_name, g.group_category, g.group_type_code, org.org_name AS bu_name, manager.user_name AS manager_name, CASE WHEN g.is_important = 1 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS important, CASE WHEN g.is_key_customer = 1 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS key_customer, CASE WHEN g.is_139 = 1 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS is139, g.location_type, g.main_contact_name, g.main_contact_phone, g.contact_book_status, g.social_security_count, g.status FROM crm_group g LEFT JOIN sys_org org ON org.id = g.bu_org_id LEFT JOIN sys_user manager ON manager.id = g.manager_user_id WHERE g.id = #{groupId} AND g.deleted_flag = 0
